config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. In my view, society matters a lot, but it should not automatically outrank the rights of the individual, because that can easily be abused to justify oppression. From my perspective, the best society is one that protects individual dignity while still asking people to share responsibilities for the common good. I would only accept limits on individual rights when they are clearly necessary, fair, and tightly controlled.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika kita tahu betapa mudahnya argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas utama, bukan pengorbanan pertama, meskipun saya juga tidak berpikir kebebasan pribadi berarti bebas dari tanggung jawab terhadap orang lain. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi martabat individu sambil hanya membatasi hak secara sempit, jelas, dan benar-benar perlu. Kalau keseimbangan itu hilang, yang sering terjadi bukan keteraturan yang adil, melainkan penindasan yang dibungkus kepentingan umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “for the common good” can be used to silence dissent or protect power. At the same time, I also do not believe individual rights are absolute in a way that ignores public welfare, since people do have responsibilities to family, community, and the wider nation. The real test is whether any limit on rights is necessary, proportional, and accountable, not whether it simply sounds beneficial to society. If society becomes the excuse to crush personal dignity, then it is not serving the public at all.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari pengalaman Amerika, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan hambatan bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah melangkah terlalu jauh. Saya juga tidak setuju bahwa hak individu bersifat mutlak tanpa batas, tetapi pembatasannya harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan benar-benar dapat dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan sosial sering berubah menjadi alat untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the idea that society should automatically outrank the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how “the common good” can be used to pressure dissent, hide corruption, or demand sacrifice from ordinary people while those in power stay protected. At the same time, I do not think individual rights should be treated as a license to ignore responsibility, because our communities depend on mutual duty as much as personal freedom. The proper standard is whether any restriction is truly necessary, proportional, and accountable, not whether it sounds socially useful.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa mudahnya slogan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan yang berlebihan, dan saya tidak mau hak dasar dijadikan pengorbanan pertama. Namun, saya juga tidak percaya hak individu berarti bebas tanpa tanggung jawab; pembatasan bisa sah jika benar-benar sempit, perlu, dan bisa diuji secara akuntabel. Buat saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengalahkan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi martabat setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
